description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the julia:1.0 Docker image for all jobs. Add a test stage job called test:1.0 that runs the two commands: `julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.clone(pwd()); Pkg.build("Bitcoin"); Pkg.test("Bitcoin"; coverage = true)'` and `julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.add("Coverage"); import Bitcoin; cd(joinpath(dirname(pathof(Bitcoin)), "..")); using Coverage; cl, tl = get_summary(process_folder()); println("(" , cl/tl*100 , "% ) covered")'`. Add a deploy stage job named pages that runs only on the master branch, executes `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y git`, then `julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.clone(pwd()); Pkg.build("Bitcoin");'`, `julia -e 'using Pkg; import Bitcoin; Pkg.add("Documenter")'`, `julia --color=yes docs/make.jl`, and `mv docs/build public`, and publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
